name: School Transportation Svc Corp
districts_or_customers: Unknown; likely Broward County area (Pembroke Pines/Miramar). Multiple comparable Pembroke Pines operators (Smart Kids, Kool Kids, IMR, Pines Transportation) suggest a crowded door-to-door private school transport niche.
recent_news: No public M&A, news, or website found as of 2026; very small entity with minimal digital footprint.
fit_notes: Sub-scale (~$0.6M rev, 13 employees) Broward door-to-door operator; too small to be a standalone tuck-in but possible bolt-on for a Florida roll-up if customer contracts (private/charter school routes) are sticky.

name: Pape School Bus Inc
fleet_size_est: ~74 power units (FMCSA), 111 drivers; operates fleet across three WI offices
districts_or_customers: Blair-Taylor, Eleva-Strum, Independence/SSPP, Whitehall, Durand-Arkansaw HS, Caddie Woodlawn Elementary, St. Mary's, Holy Rosary, Stratford School District, St. Joseph Catholic School
recent_news: No M&A reported; FMCSA 2024 mileage ~783K, 'Satisfactory' safety rating (last reviewed 2006), zero crashes/OOS in trailing 24 months as of 2026. Operates from three Wisconsin offices (Independence, Durand-Arkansaw, Stratford).
fit_notes: Attractive WI tuck-in: 90-year family operator, ~74-bus fleet across 3 offices with ~10 district/parochial contracts, clean safety record. Multi-site footprint provides immediate scale in western WI where Summit/Durham historically has thin coverage.

name: Kelly S Bus Svc
districts_or_customers: Listed as approved field-trip bus service vendor for Jefferson County Public Schools (Louisville); likely also serves Oldham County Schools given Crestwood, KY HQ. Note: the kellybus.com domain refers to a Colorado/Texas operator (Kelly's Transportation Services), NOT this Crestwood KY entity.
recent_news: No public M&A, ownership, or news found as of 2026. Entity listed in D&B and Manta directories but no corporate website confirmed.
fit_notes: Mid-small KY field-trip/school operator in Louisville suburbs (Crestwood/Oldham County). ~$2.3M revenue, ~50 employees suggests modest fleet but established JCPS vendor relationship - potentially interesting bolt-on for KY footprint expansion if owner/succession can be identified.

name: E & M Bus Line Inc
districts_or_customers: Likely contractor for Bridgewater-Emery School District 30-3 (Hutchinson/McCook/Hanson counties, ~342 students); HQ on SD Highway 42 in Bridgewater consistent with small-district contracting model.
recent_news: No public M&A, news, ownership disclosure, or website found as of 2026. Very low digital footprint typical of rural SD school-bus contractor.
fit_notes: Rural SD operator presumably tied to a single small district (Bridgewater-Emery, 342 students). Sub-scale and geographically remote from Summit's core footprint; low strategic fit unless part of broader SD/MN micro-roll-up.

name: School Transport Inc
fleet_size_est: FMCSA snapshot (USDOT 3945021) shows only 4 power units / 4 drivers - inconsistent with 79-employee figure; either a separate registered entity or fleet is largely off-FMCSA (intrastate). True fleet likely small.
districts_or_customers: Unknown; HQ on W Brandon Blvd (Hillsborough County, Tampa metro). FMCSA address listed as 4701 N 15th, Tampa, FL 33610. Likely private/charter school door-to-door rather than HCPS contractor.
recent_news: FMCSA shows intrastate private passenger (non-business) classification; not authorized for interstate for-hire. No M&A, news, or website found as of 2026.
fit_notes: Small Tampa-area operator with conflicting data (FMCSA 4 units vs. 79 employees in source data - employee figure likely overstated or includes related entities). Low confirmed scale; not a clear tuck-in target without further diligence on actual fleet/contracts.
